text.title: Trunk-Based Challenges & Diagnostics Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema for the report artefact this methodology produces. Validator enforces required keys + per-field constraints + forbidden patterns.

example.code: { "trunk_break_freq": "1_to_3_per_week", "first_failing_check": "ci_speed", "recommended_fix": "CI p95 = 18 minutes; parallelise tests + move integration suite to nightly; target < 10 minutes.", "report_format": "markdown", "pr_size_p95": 280, "ci_p95_minutes": 18.4, "review_p95_hours": 6.2 }

example.note: Recommends reverting to long-lived branches; that violates broken-trunk-is-missing-gate.

pattern.description: Recommendation includes returning to feature branches > 24h or GitFlow
Recommends fixing CI + PR size + flags simultaneously
pattern.why: Violates fix-first-failing-check; teams finish nothing this way.

pattern.description: Report mentions active flags but no .aidocs/feature-flags.md entry
